content: S.1 — Build app/services/user_preferences.py: extract sex/age/body/cultural/style fields → prompt-friendly text block
S.2 — Extend marketplace_search.suggest_for_query() (text-driven, not just gap-driven)
S.3 — Build app/services/stylist_widen.py: orchestrator for marketplace + fashion scout + Nano Banana visualization
S.4 — Wire user_preferences + widen into /api/v1/stylist endpoint, harden against 500s
S.6 — Extend StylistAdvice schema with marketplace_suggestions + fashion_scout_picks + generated_examples + applied_preferences
S.7 — Frontend: render new fields in Stylist.jsx + add 'Search wider' toggle pill
S.8 — Lint, restart, smoke-test the regression-fix path (ask for shoes when none in closet)
